title: Implement BulletManager.fireBullet() independent firing (turret/trap, shooter nullable)

reference_files.reason: Independent firing - BulletManager.fireBullet(level, position, direction, snapshot, shooter), turret/trap usage, shooter can be null, gunId/gunInstanceUuid always null
BulletManager API - fireBullet signature, returns BulletRecord
API overview - BulletManager.fireBullet(Level, Vec3, Vec3, BulletSnapshot, UUID)

acceptance_criteria: BulletManager.fireBullet(Level level, Vec3 position, Vec3 direction, BulletSnapshot snapshot, UUID shooter) method implemented
Creates BulletRecord with: assigned bullet ID (from counter), position, direction, snapshot, shooter (from param, can be null)
Snapshot field conventions for independent firing: gunId always null, gunInstanceUuid always null, shooter depends on param (null if param null)
Bullet added to BulletManager active list + chunk bucket
Does NOT go through shooting engine (no fire rate, no ShootPredicate, no PreShootEvent/PostShootEvent, no sound)
Bullet enters normal tick loop (flight, collision, damage, hooks) once registered
